description: Vertical White House poster. At the top, centered on a navy band, is the engraved White House building icon and the wordmark 'The WHITE HOUSE.' Below, a large headline in mixed white and gold serif type reads 'New Economic Data Highlights the Strength and Resilience of President Trump's Economy' (the phrase 'Strength and Resilience of' in gold). A white rounded callout box overlaps the image with bold navy text: 'America is building, investing, and growing once again - because President Trump has put American jobs, American manufacturing, and American prosperity first.' The lower two-thirds is a photograph of Donald Trump in a dark navy suit and red tie speaking at a presidential podium bearing the gold presidential seal, set against a large backlit American flag and a teleprompter glass; an 'FII Priority / MIAMI' sign is partly visible on the lectern.
notable_text: New Economic Data Highlights the Strength and Resilience of President Trump's Economy | America is building, investing, and growing once again - because President Trump has put American jobs, American manufacturing, and American prosperity first.
